content.json:
## 👥 UDCSP — Citizen journey funnel

Funnel from page view to case open across all channels in this country. Events are read from `customEvents` (UDCSP convention: `name` starts with `apply.`, `eligibility.`, `my-cases.`, `voice.`) with a fallback on `requests` for endpoints that have not been instrumented as custom events yet. Per-language split uses `customDimensions['locale']`; channel split uses `customDimensions['x-channel-actor']`.

content.query:
customEvents
| extend Step = case(
    name startswith 'page.',                                                  '1. Page view',
    name startswith 'apply.start',                                            '2. Apply start',
    name startswith 'eligibility.',                                           '3. Eligibility check',
    name startswith 'apply.submit',                                           '4. Submit',
    name startswith 'my-cases.',                                              '5. My cases',
    name startswith 'call.' or name startswith 'realtime.' or name startswith 'voice.' or name startswith 'topic_router.',
                                                                              '6. Voice / assistant turn',
    'other')
| where Step != 'other'
| summarize Count=count() by Step
| order by Step asc

customEvents
| extend locale = tostring(customDimensions['locale'])
| where isnotempty(locale)
| summarize Events=count() by bin(timestamp, 15m), locale
| order by timestamp asc

customEvents
| extend channel = tostring(customDimensions['x-channel-actor'])
| where isnotempty(channel)
| summarize Events=count() by channel
| order by Events desc

content.json: ### Endpoint hits — `requests` fallback (in case custom events are sparse)

content.query:
requests
| summarize Hits=count(), p95Ms=percentile(duration,95) by name, cloud_RoleName=coalesce(cloud_RoleName,'unknown')
| order by Hits desc
| take 40

content.json:
---
## 🔗 Cross-resource view (Phase A — Log Analytics)

APIM gateway logs from the platform-shared LAW (`udcsp-no-prod-law`) — the actual citizen-rail traffic on the NO gateway. DK/SE workbooks would query their own LAWs; this section is most informative on the NO instance.
### APIM citizen-rail hits — per API per status

content.query:
workspace("/subscriptions/00b9d21c-db88-4467-9cb8-8e80c7f84190/resourceGroups/udcsp-no-observability-rg/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/udcsp-no-prod-law").ApiManagementGatewayLogs
| where ApiId in ("agent-topic-router", "eligibility-checks", "case-management", "document-intake", "gdpr")
| extend StatusBucket = case(ResponseCode < 300, "2xx", ResponseCode < 400, "3xx", ResponseCode < 500, "4xx", "5xx")
| summarize Hits=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), ApiId
| order by TimeGenerated asc

workspace("/subscriptions/00b9d21c-db88-4467-9cb8-8e80c7f84190/resourceGroups/udcsp-no-observability-rg/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/udcsp-no-prod-law").AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.LOGIC" and Category == "WorkflowRuntime"
| where Resource contains "application-intake"
| summarize Runs=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), status_s
| order by TimeGenerated asc
